hero.text: We're Team Human, a community of builders who believe the best tech starts with empathy, creativity, and real human connection.
beliefs.title: What we believe
beliefs.empathy.title: Empathy First
beliefs.empathy.desc: Great products start with understanding people — not just users, but humans with real needs and emotions.
beliefs.courage.title: Creative Courage
beliefs.courage.desc: AI can optimize, but only humans can imagine what doesn't exist yet. We celebrate the weird, bold ideas.
beliefs.community.title: Community Over Competition
beliefs.community.desc: We grow faster together. Our meetups are spaces where makers share honestly — wins, failures, and everything between.
beliefs.craft.title: Craft Matters
beliefs.craft.desc: In a world of AI-generated everything, the human touch is a superpower. We value intentional, thoughtful work.
team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Real events, real people, real conversations.
team.danny.desc: AI can scale solutions, but only humans can ask the right questions. That's why we gather.
team.dave.desc: In an era where anyone can build, the real edge is building together — with intention and heart.
team.eric.desc: The most impactful projects start not with code, but with people who show up for each other.
team.kelly.desc: When makers connect honestly, magic happens. I'm here to make sure those connections keep growing.
team.rachel.desc: We don't just talk about building — we design, ship, and learn together in the open.
team.sireal.desc: AI changes how we work, but community changes why we work. That's worth getting right.
team.annie.desc: Behind every great product is a team that found each other. I help make those introductions happen.
team.chedda.desc: Developers deserve a stage, not just a desk. I'm here to help them share, connect, and grow.
footer.tagline: For product makers, by product makers
events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Real events, real people, real conversations. Come build with us.
